title: Generate test harness and disposable-copy execution design

requirements: Define 6 command groups: [build, cli-vitest, server-vitest, shared-vitest, read-only-preflight, disposable-copy-e2e]
Document 5 representative target paths: [README.md, assets/script/Main.ts, assets/script/game/initialize/Initialize.ts, assets/script/game/common/config/GameUIConfig.ts, doc/using.md]
Define 2 built-service entry points to invoke from Node scripts: [planContext, getRuleSections]
Preserve 2 safety modes: [read-only checks in /mnt/c/Project/oops-framework, write-heavy validation in a disposable copy only]
acceptance: 6 command groups are enumerated in the task output: verify by reviewing the generated harness plan against the explicit list

3 focused Fabric validation commands are present: verify by matching [pnpm -r build, pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test, pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts]
1 shared-schema validation command is present: verify by matching [pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run test/agents-meta.test.ts]
2 target-repo CLI commands are present with safety split: verify by matching [fabric init --plan in original repo, fabric init --yes in disposable copy]
1 Node script or equivalent invocation plan exists for built server services: verify by matching [planContext + getRuleSections] in the harness design

conventions: Do not modify production source files
Treat /mnt/c/Project/oops-framework as read-only except inside a disposable copy
Use focused package-level Vitest commands instead of relying on pnpm -r --if-present test

artifacts.usage: L0-L3 validation layers, scenario list, and safety rules
artifacts.contains: 15 scenario checks and weighted acceptance criteria

artifacts.usage: Commit mapping, command baselines, target repo characteristics, and candidate E2E flow
artifacts.contains: 8-step disposable-copy execution plan and changed-surface inventory
workflow id, implementation repo, target repo, and phase gate

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for commit surfaces, command baselines, and target repo safety notes
Load the test analysis for L0-L3 layers, risk notes, and scenario inventory
Inspect changed code and docs surfaces that the harness must validate
Confirm package-level build and test command patterns before generating the harness task

implementation_approach.title: Assemble validation inventory
implementation_approach.description: Extract the 6 command groups, 5 representative target paths, 4 artifact checks, and 2 server service entry points from the loaded context.
modification_points: Document 6 command groups: [build, cli-vitest, server-vitest, shared-vitest, read-only-preflight, disposable-copy-e2e]
logic_flow: Extract command, path, and artifact inventories
Resolve gaps against the changed commit surfaces
Produce a single harness-oriented task definition

implementation_approach.title: Design safe execution split
implementation_approach.description: Translate the inventory into read-only checks for the original repo and write-heavy checks for a disposable copy.
modification_points: Assign 2 original-repo commands: [git status --short, fabric init --plan]
Assign 4 disposable-copy actions: [filesystem copy, fabric init --yes, service smoke calls, fabric doctor --audit]
logic_flow: Lock the original repo to read-only
Route all write-heavy commands to the disposable copy
Record server-process continuity for selection_token checks
Embed the safety split into acceptance criteria

implementation_approach.title: Emit execution-ready task details
implementation_approach.description: Finalize the harness task with concrete commands, focus paths, and verification statements usable by downstream validation and E2E tasks.
modification_points: Produce 5 measurable acceptance checks for command presence and safety rules
Record 1 downstream dependency edge to IMPL-001.3
Record 1 session-level convention set for no-production-edits behavior
logic_flow: Fold the harness design into quantified requirements
Preserve downstream continuity for validation and execution tasks

test_commands.run_tests: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/index.test.ts src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/rule-sections.test.ts src/services/audit-log.test.ts src/services/doctor.test.ts src/tools/rule-sections.test.ts && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared exec vitest run test/agents-meta.test.ts
